summary: Cook County Department of Revenue reference table mapping unincorporated municipalities to townships and ZIP codes. Columns include ZIP code, municipality name, and township name.
Cook County Chief Judge's directory of circuit court judges. Columns include judge first and last name, position, division, room number, work phone, and courthouse location with address and zip.

Cook County Recorder of Deeds dataset of quit claim deed transactions recorded from January through November 2012. Columns include recorded date, execution date, document type, PIN, consideration amount, and property location.

Cook County Clerk lobbyist activity registry tracking registered lobbying contacts with county officials. Columns include lobbyist name, firm, client, person lobbied, their title, activity date, contact nature, and subject matter.

2010 U.S. Census mail return rates and demographic characteristics by census tract in Cook County, IL. Columns include population counts and percentages by age group, race/ethnicity, Hispanic origin, primary language, and hard-to-count designation.
Cook County Auditor published reports listing audit documents by report date and fiscal year. Columns include link, report date, and fiscal year.

Cook County Recorder of Deeds dataset of mortgage transactions recorded from January through November 2012. Columns include execution date, recorded date, document type, document number, PIN, consideration amount, and property location.

Median household income estimates for Cook County municipalities from 2000 Census and American Community Survey (ACS) 2005-2009. Columns include municipality name, location, and median household income for 2000 Census, 2005 ACS, 2006 ACS, 2007 ACS, and 2005-2009 ACS.

Cook County Facilities Management work orders for August 2011 tracking maintenance tasks by trade. Columns include open and close dates for trades including tinsmith, sign, engineer, asbestos, laborer, ironworker, carpenter, electrician, and electrical technician.
Cook County Health and Hospitals System outpatient registrations by ZIP code for fiscal year 2011 (through June). Columns include ZIP code, 2011 year-to-date registration count, and location fields.
Illinois EPA (IEPA) listing of state compost facilities as of December 2011. Columns include facility name, owner, county, type of waste accepted, total waste, truck tip fee, phone, and location.

Cook County Board of Review 2010 property identification number (PIN) data for assessment appeals. Columns include PIN, property class, type, assessed land value, total value, board of review land value, total value, and board of review value.

Percent of population below poverty level by Cook County municipality from the 2005-2009 American Community Survey. Columns include municipality name, location, and percent living below poverty level.

Cook County Board of Review 2009 property identification number (PIN) data for assessment appeals. Columns include PIN, property class, type, assessed land value, total value, and board of review values.

Cook County Budget Management daily appropriations report for September 2011 showing budget status by department. Columns include fund, department number, adjusted budget, total expenditures, encumbrances, pre-encumbrances, budget remaining, and GL period.

Historical Cook County Department of Revenue listing of businesses subject to home rule taxes through September 2011. Columns include business name, address, ZIP code, state, return type, and return type description.
Cook County Building and Zoning certificates of occupancy issued from fiscal year 2009 through early 2011. Columns include fiscal year and count of certificates of occupancy issued.

Cook County Clerk polling place locations for the November 4, 2014 Gubernatorial Election in suburban Cook County. Columns include polling place name, address, city, ZIP code, precinct, accessibility indicator, and location.
Cook County Treasurer list of registered buyers for the 2011 Scavenger Sale, which allows purchase of delinquent property tax liens. Columns include buyer ID and buyer name.
Cook County Treasurer list of registered buyers for the 2009 Scavenger Sale, which allows purchase of delinquent property tax liens. Columns include buyer ID and buyer name.

Cook County Environmental Control asbestos demolition summary report covering February 2011 through August 2012. Columns include project location (city, municipality, address, state, ZIP) and demolition start and end dates.
Cook County Environmental Control asbestos removal permits issued in 2010. Columns include building address and city, ZIP code, inspection fees, filing fees, and permit details.

Cook County Board of Review 2009 property identification numbers (PINs) for assessment appeals. Columns include PIN, property class, type, assessed land value, total value, and board of review values.
Cook County Chief Judge's directory of circuit court division locations. Columns include judge name and title, division street address, suite, phone, fax, and location.
Cook County Industrial Engineers natural gas usage by government facility and month. Columns include month, fiscal year, facility address, gas usage, and gas cost.

Cook County Facilities Management monthly electricity usage for county government facilities from fiscal year 2007 through September 2011. Columns include service address, service town, fiscal year, month, usage in kilowatt-hours, and total cost.

Cook County Public Defender pending cases by month and case type for fiscal year 2011 (December 2010 through August 2011). Columns include month/location, felony, homicide, juvenile, civil, misdemeanor, and PC and appeals case counts.
Illinois EPA (IEPA) e-waste collection sites in Cook County as of December 2011. Columns include collection site address, managing collector, phone number, and location fields.
Cook County historical budget data from 1993 through 2011 showing appropriations and expenditures by year. Columns include appropriation and expenditure amounts for multiple fiscal years.

Cook County Board of Ethics monthly activity summary for fiscal year 2011. Columns include month, advisory opinions issued, new investigations opened, training seminars, employees trained, inquiries, lobbyist expense audits, vendor compliance audits, and political contribution audits.
Cook County Treasurer list of registered buyers for the 2009 Annual Tax Sale, which allows purchase of delinquent property taxes. Columns include buyer ID and buyer name.
Cook County Treasurer list of registered buyers for the 2010 Annual Tax Sale, which allows purchase of delinquent property taxes. Columns include buyer ID and buyer name.
Cook County directory of circuit court judges as of September 2011. Columns include judge first name, division, section, phone, area, and courthouse location.
Cook County Commissioner contact information and district data updated 2015. Columns include commissioner name, district URL links, phone, fax, email, and district location.

Cook County municipalities ranked by percent of population age 25+ with at least an associate's degree from the 2005-2009 ACS. Columns include municipality name, location, and percent of population with at least an associate's degree.
Number of vacant commercial addresses by Cook County municipality as of March 2009 ACS. Columns include municipality name, city, location, and number of vacant commercial addresses.
Cook County Risk Management employee healthcare costs by department for June 2012. Columns include department name, number of employees, and total health cost.

Cook County Human Resources 2010 employees by union vs. non-union status per pay period. Columns include pay period end date, total employees under temporary positions (UTP), union and non-union counts and amounts, and union/non-union percentages.

Cook County Facilities Management electricity usage across all county facilities by month from fiscal year 2008 through February 2012. Columns include facility address, fiscal year, month, usage in kWh, and cost.
Cook County capital planning projects approved for 2012 Q1 across all county government agencies. Columns include project name, description, company, category, start date, and end date.

Illinois EPA (IEPA) facilities table listing waste management facilities in Cook County as of December 2011. Columns include facility name, owner, operator, type of waste accepted, recycling status, location, municipality, and 2008 tonnage.
Cook County Medical Examiner autopsy status statistics from the 2009 Annual Report. Columns include autopsy status category, count, and percent.
Cook County Health and Hospitals outpatient registrations by ZIP code for 2011 (through June). Columns include ZIP code, 2011 year-to-date count, and location fields.

Cook County Building and Zoning building, plumbing, and electrical permits applied for in fiscal year 2005, with location for mapping. Columns include fiscal year, township name, building, plumbing, electrical permit counts, totals, and location.

Cook County Industrial Engineers natural gas usage by county government facility, month, and year through February 2012. Columns include service address, service town, fiscal year, month, usage in therms, and total cost.
Cook County Public Health historical flu vaccination partner locations from 2012. Columns include site name, contact information, schedule, and location with address, city, state, and ZIP.

Cook County population growth by municipality and waste agency jurisdiction comparing 2000 and 2010 Census counts. Columns include municipality, waste agency, 2000 and 2010 population, population change, and percent change.

Cook County Facilities Management natural gas usage across all county facilities by month from fiscal year 2008 through February 2012. Columns include facility address, fiscal year, month, usage in therms, and cost.

Cook County Clerk Tax Increment Financing (TIF) districts and revenue by municipality for 2010. Columns include TIF district name, agency number, municipality, first tax year, year cancelled, 2009 and 2010 TIF revenue, and year-over-year percent difference.
Cook County Animal Control animal intake counts by species for 2010 and partial 2011. Columns include year, species counts (dog, cat, rabbit, ferret, cow, guard dog, unknown), and totals.
Cook County Animal Control animal intake counts by species and city for fiscal year 2010. Columns include year, city location, species counts (dog, cat, ferret, unknown), and totals.
Cook County Human Resources 2010 new hires and terminations by month. Columns include month/year, new hire count, and termination count.
Cook County Building and Zoning violations issued by township from 2005 through 2011. Columns include fiscal year, township name, violation type, and total count.
Cook County Medical Examiner 2009 autopsy data on manner of death by gender, age, and race. Columns include manner of death, sex, age group, race, and count.

Cook County Administrative Hearings top 5 violations by all departments for fiscal year 2011 (December 2010 through August 2011). Columns include violation text, violation code, and number of violations.

Cook County Animal Control animal intake counts by species and coat color for fiscal year 2010. Columns include year, color, species counts (dog, cat, ferret, guard dog, rabbit, cow, unknown), and totals.
Cook County Medical Examiner 2009 decedents by cause of death. Columns include cause of death category, count, and percent.

Cook County preliminary budget revenues for fiscal year 2013 with 2012 actuals and estimates. Columns include revenue description, FY2012 budgeted revenue, FY2012 actuals, December-May amounts, June-November estimates, estimated 2012 year-end, and FY2013 preliminary estimate.
Cook County Medical Examiner 2009 decedents by race. Columns include race category, count, and percent.
Cook County Medical Examiner 2009 cause of death with specific underlying reasons. Columns include cause of death category, specific cause, count, and percent.
Cook County Board of Review district boundaries based on the 2010 census. Columns include district name, area, perimeter, compactness, and geometry.
Cook County Medical Examiner 2009 deaths by gender, age range, and race. Columns include sex, age range, race, and count.
Cook County Risk Management workers' compensation claims from April 2012 by department. Columns include department/office name and total claim amount.
Cook County Public Defender appointments and dispositions by case type for fiscal year 2011. Columns include month, felony, misdemeanor, and juvenile appointment and disposition counts.
Cook County Environmental Control 2010 energy audit projects listing locations and expenditures. Columns include street address, ZIP code, project sub-category, dollars spent, and location fields.
Cook County Clerk suburban early voting locations for 2012. Columns include site name, address, city, state, ZIP code, and hours of operation.
Cook County Administrative Hearings top 5 violations from the Sheriff's Office from September 2011 to March 2012. Columns include violation code, violation text, and number of violations.

Cook County Q3 2012 public safety performance management goal assessment for jail population reduction. Columns include reporting office, 2011 actuals, 2012 target, Q3 year-to-date actuals, target, and variance.
Cook County Human Resources 2010 job posting information and applicant counts by month. Columns include posting number, job title, job code, closing date, month, and number of applicants.

Cook County Administrative Hearings ticket summary report from September 2011 to March 2012. Columns include department name, number of tickets issued, total original amount, and total adjusted fines.
Cook County Board of Review aggregate PIN counts filed by assessment year from 2008 to 2010. Columns include year, total PINs, and notes.

Cook County Facilities Management electricity usage at the 10290 S 76th facility by month from fiscal year 2008 through February 2012. Columns include facility location, fiscal year, month, usage in kWh, and cost.
Cook County Medical Examiner 2009 manner of death by type. Columns include manner of death category, count, and percent.

Cook County Animal Control gender by species for fiscal year 2011. Columns include year, animal type, and counts by gender category (male, female, male castrated, female spayed, female with litter, male unknown, female unknown).

Cook County fiscal year 2018 year-end revenue projections vs. adopted budget. Columns include fund description, adopted FY18 budget, actual December-May amounts, estimated June-November amounts, and estimated FY18 year-end total.
Cook County Risk Management employee health costs by department for fiscal year 2011. Columns include department number, number of employees, and health costs for the department.
Cook County Medical Examiner 2009 manner of death by race. Columns include race, manner of death category, and count.

Cook County Q3 2012 property and taxation performance management goal assessment for fair property valuation. Columns include reporting office, tax year 2009, 2011 actuals, TY2012 targets, year-to-date actuals, and variance.

Cook County Budget Management department general fund 2012 year-end expenses and 2013 preliminary estimates. Columns include department number, description, approved and adopted amounts, December-May expenditures, June-November estimates, projected 2012 total, and 2013 preliminary estimates.
Cook County Administrative Hearings top 5 Environmental Control violations from September 2011 to March 2012. Columns include violation code, violation text, and number of violations.
Cook County Medical Examiner 2009 decedents by race from the annual report. Columns include race category, count, and percent.

Cook County Risk Management provider payments for workers' compensation claims from April 2012. Columns include fiscal year of treatment and payment, hospital billing, total billed, provider and IDHFS discounts, unrelated amounts, amount payable, and board meeting.
Cook County early voting locations for 2012. Columns include site name, address, city, state, and ZIP code.

Cook County fiscal year 2019 special purpose fund revenue and expenditure projections by fund. Columns include fund number, description, 2018 and 2019 estimated total resources, revenue estimates, estimated expenditures, and projected ending balance.
Cook County Environmental Control project list with locations and project types. Columns include project name, type, street address, ZIP code, location fields, and project link.

Cook County fiscal year 2019 preliminary expense estimates by department. Columns include department name, 2018 approved and adopted budget, 2018 estimated expenditures, department 2019 estimate, and executive 2019 estimate.

Cook County Facilities Management electricity usage at the 110 S Barrington Rd facility by month from fiscal year 2008 through February 2012. Columns include facility location, fiscal year, month, usage in kWh, and cost.
Cook County Risk Management employee healthcare costs by department for July 2012. Columns include department name, number of employees, and total health cost.

Cook County Facilities Management electricity usage at the 5600 Old Orchard facility by month from fiscal year 2008 through February 2012. Columns include facility location, fiscal year, month, usage in kWh, and cost.

Cook County Commission on Human Rights 2011 monthly activity summary. Columns include month, new complaints filed, investigations closed, other closures, training seminars, employees trained, inquiries, commission hearings, and conciliation activities.

Cook County Risk Management 2011 employee healthcare provider enrollment by pool and vendor. Columns include pool name, HMO Illinois/Blue Cross HMO, Classic Blue HMO, Blue Cross PPO, tier totals, and percent by subscriber.

Cook County Human Rights Commission bases for claims in complaints filed for fiscal year 2011. Columns include claim type and counts by protected class: age, disability, marital status, parental status, religion, sexual orientation, housing status, sexual harassment, and retaliation.

Cook County fiscal year 2018 year-end expense projections by department. Columns include department name, 2018 approved and adopted budget, December-May expenditures and encumbrances, June-November estimates, adjusted appropriation, and total estimated expenditures.
Cook County Medical Examiner 2009 deaths by day of the week death occurred. Columns include day of death, count, and percent.
Cook County Medical Examiner 2009 manner of death by autopsy status. Columns include manner of death category, autopsy status, and count.

Cook County Facilities Management inventory of closed jail cells as of September 30, 2011 by division and trade requiring repair. Columns include division facility, cells requiring plumbing, electrician, brick, engineer, tinsmith, and electrical tech work, and total cells.
Cook County Board of Review aggregate assessment reductions by year from 2008 to 2010. Columns include year, reduction amount, assessed total value, and board of review total value.
Cook County Medical Examiner 2009 manner of death by race. Columns include manner of death category, race, and count.
Cook County Environmental Control selected environmental projects from 2011. Columns include project type, project year, street address, ZIP code, location fields, and project link.
Cook County Risk Management employment enrollment summary by department for April 2012. Columns include county department number, enrollment count, and cost.
